title: Phlojodicarpus villosus
taxonomy: Phlojodicarpus villosus is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to North America. The classification of Phlojodicarpus villosus includes being a part of the order Fabales and the family Fabaceae. Within the family, it is placed in the subfamily Faboideae. Its exact classification can be summarized as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Rosids.
